name: PartHive
description: Import EasyEDA/JLCPCB (LCSC) parts into a KiCad library
description_full: PartHive imports any EasyEDA / JLCPCB (LCSC) component into a local KiCad library from its LCSC part number (e.g. C25804). It creates and links a symbol library (.kicad_sym), a footprint library (.pretty) and a 3D-model library (.3dshapes) inside a single library directory, wires the footprint to the symbol and the 3D model to the footprint, and can register the libraries in KiCad automatically. Footprint reference defaults to '?', symbol/footprint text sizes are configurable, and 3D download can be skipped on slow connections. Built on the AGPL-3.0 easyeda2kicad converter.
